_meta: Rendered SNAPSHOT of the Tiger<->GB Workflow Alignment Package (artifacts/Tiger_GB_Workflow_Alignment_Package_2026-06-04.md). The Atrium 'How it flows' lens embeds a mirror of this. Re-snapshot when the package changes. Practice, not canon.
title: How it flows
source: Tiger ↔ GB Workflow Alignment Package (2026-06-04) — rendered snapshot
status: Practice, not canon — prove 1–2 full cycles before canonizing.

lanes.label: KM-1176
lanes.plain: You're the boss — nothing important happens until you say yes.

lanes.label: Tiger
lanes.plain: Tiger builds and wires the things.

lanes.label: GB
lanes.plain: GB thinks ahead and suggests — it never edits directly.

stages.label: Capture
stages.plain: You speak a thought or select text in the book.
stages.tech: B51 voice delta (Hopper) or a PDF text selection in Atrium.

stages.label: Packet
stages.plain: Your thought becomes a little ticket.
stages.tech: A B32 obligation (DRAFT debit) carrying human seed + page ref + LGP hint + next_gate.

stages.label: Process
stages.plain: A robot helper reads it and writes a suggested change.
stages.tech: Headless producer reads the intent + manuscript → grounded grouped diffs (a proposal). Tooling packets skip this.

stages.label: Accept
stages.plain: You look and say yes or no. THIS is the one button that matters.
stages.tech: The single human gate — Accept/Reject in the diff-review. Nothing lands without it (K1).

stages.label: Apply
stages.plain: If you said yes, the helper makes the change safely.
stages.tech: Apply agent re-tests → commits (local) → seals → closes the obligation → recompiles the PDF.

stages.label: Seal
stages.plain: It stamps a receipt so nothing is ever lost.
stages.tech: Cylinder seal (hash-chained) + obligation close with evidence.

stages.label: Coherence
stages.plain: A check makes sure the book and the code still match.
stages.tech: Book↔code drift check. On drift: GB proposes the fix → Tiger surfaces it → KM ratifies.
